zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE於1165年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內時，她的父親Guy De Châtillon II23歲，母親Alix de Dreux9歲。她於1193年與Guillaume DE GARLANDE V結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1216年之後在法國洛萊。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE was born in 1165, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Guy De Châtillon II, was 23 and her mother, Alix de Dreux, was 9. She married Guillaume DE GARLANDE V in 1193. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after 1216, in Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE est née en 1165, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guy De Châtillon II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume DE GARLANDE V en 1193. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1216, à Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE 1165 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy De Châtillon II 23 und ihre Mutter Alix de Dreux 9. Sie hat 1193 Guillaume DE GARLANDE V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1216 in Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE è nata il nel 1165 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Guy De Châtillon II, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume DE GARLANDE V nel 1193. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1216, nel Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNEが1165年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Guy De Châtillon IIは23歳，母Alix de Dreuxは9歳であった。1193年にGuillaume DE GARLANDE Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1216年以後にフランスロレィヌで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE(이)가 1165년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy De Châtillon II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1193년 Guillaume DE GARLANDE V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 이후 프랑스 로레이인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE nasceu em 1165, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guy De Châtillon II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume DE GARLANDE V em 1193. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1216, em Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE родилась в 1165 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy De Châtillon II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume DE GARLANDE V в 1193 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1216 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle DE CHÂTILLON-SUR-MARNE nació en 1165, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guy De Châtillon II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Guillaume DE GARLANDE V en 1193. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1216, en Lorraine, Francia.
